ledger.note: account casey.zero.1780793343574@acme.test created, auto-logged-in, redirected to /onboarding
No email-verification gate exists: signup creates a session and lands on /onboarding directly. (Frictionless by design; flagged in report.)
cold login as casey.zero.1780793343574@acme.test via UI form → /app
9 verticals offered; selected first
AI workforce provisioned (employees + skills + starter task); "Activate Workforce" CTA shown
three-step hub renders with progress strip
workforce installed (template predicate ticked server-side; install ran)
runtime API key minted + connect command shown in UI · runtime host handshake → HTTP 200
BYOK credential saved (encrypted; secret_preview set) → API key setup works
detected + registered (our handshake shows) + manual sections render
No dedicated VPS pairing UI yet (task #105, queued next). API + curl flow works: POST /api/onboarding/runtime-key {runtime:"hermes-vps"}.
billing panel renders (fuel meter + ledger tabs)
Credit purchase routes to Stripe checkout — requires live Stripe keys + a real/test card, not completable in this local sandbox. UI surface reached.
marketplace catalog renders with credit-state pricing
Purchase requires a positive credit balance (fed by Stripe). With 0 credits the UI correctly shows "Insufficient credits"; full purchase needs the credit grant Stripe provides.
Flight Deck (desktop terminal) landing renders
overview shell renders; setup checklist auto-hidden (100% complete)
Daily Brief / Executive Briefing panel present on overview
Value/ROI report panel renders
Orchestration surface renders
setup percent: 100% → 100%
mirror endpoint HTTP 404 (mirror is opt-in)
